items.project_definition: The specific numerical iteration identifier to be persisted within the doc_versions table upon detection of source changes.
The relational storage engine utilized for maintaining document state and iteration history.
The mathematical process used to generate a unique fixed-size signature to detect content alterations.
The final portable document format generated as the output of the enrichment pipeline.
The prefix used to identify formal functional constraints within the system specification.
The specific 256-bit secure algorithm employed to verify file integrity and trigger updates.
The mechanism of comparing digital signatures to determine if a source file requires a new iteration.
